---
name: Rule proposal
about: Propose a new rule or ban-list entry, sourced from an observed failure
title: "[rule] <craft file>: <one-line rule summary>"
labels: rule-proposal
---

**Which craft file** (design, writing, code, ...):

**The observed failure** (what the model actually produced, ideally quoted; when and how it
slipped past the current rules):

**Proposed rule text** (exact wording, checkable; ban entries include the replacement):

**Which section it belongs in** (numbered rule section / ban list / verification checklist):

**What existing rule it interacts with, if any** (conflicts get resolved by deletion, not
stacking):
